altitude.current: The Turtle/NLM/APR work existed as a LoopAndLoop delivery artifact: a ready loop, eval packs, APR round notes, and local validation, but Fairy Tale had no spiral ledger tying that execution to a double-helix governance strand.
altitude.target: Promote the LoopAndLoop Turtle risk loop into a Fairy Tale spiral record: execution evidence and learning/governance evidence must be paired before any helix/evolution claim is inherited.

execution_strand.objective: Connect applego/loopandloop's Turtle/NLM/APR risk loop to bonginkan/fairy_tale's Loop -> Spiral -> Double-Helix operating model without changing runtime behavior or expanding trading authority.
execution_strand.engineer_target: applego/loopandloop commit 34df521 adds examples/turtle-apr-risk-loop.yaml, eval-packs/turtle-apr-risk-visible.jsonl, eval-packs/turtle-apr-risk-hidden.jsonl, .apr/workflows/turtle-apr-risk.yaml, .apr/rounds/turtle-apr-risk/round_1.md, and docs/skillops/apr/turtle-apr-risk-loop-2026-07-09.md.

learning_governance_strand.double_loop_evaluation: The APR/NLM review attacked the first loop as too prose-driven: trade permissions, verifier ownership, external review, copyright boundaries, claim lifecycle, and pilot-before-scale were not typed strongly enough to prevent a confident but ungoverned loop from masquerading as a reusable trading template.
learning_governance_strand.governing_variable_change: A LoopAndLoop artifact may be referenced by Fairy Tale as helix-ready only when it carries a structured riskContract, explicit authority boundary, typed verifiers, hidden eval coverage, externalReviewPolicy, artifact hash/event envelope rules, and a pilot-before-scale constraint.
learning_governance_strand.next_altitude: A future evolution variant may mutate the risk-loop template only after this spiral ledger plus LoopAndLoop status/list/typecheck/test evidence remain green and a new variant record declares the safety floor immutable.
learning_governance_strand.stop_or_descend: Do not treat NLM book capture, APR approval, or a ready LoopAndLoop YAML as trading authority. Descend to a docs/eval-only loop unless live broker credentials, deployment, and human approval gates are explicitly present and verified.

risk.highest_uncertainty: A market-strategy source can be over-abstracted into automation authority: a readable NLM/PDF insight or APR no-block can be mistaken for permission to run capital-bearing trades.
risk.spike: Constrain the integration to evidence-carrying docs/YAML/eval artifacts and validate the loop externally through LoopAndLoop CLI plus Fairy Tale spiral checks before inheriting the governance template.

mismatches: The initial LoopAndLoop design could pass as a ready loop while leaving risk authority and external review as prose rather than typed contract surfaces.
NLM source evidence was advisory and could not itself distinguish training, evaluation, and live execution authority.
Fairy Tale had no local spiral receipt for the LoopAndLoop artifact, so the helix claim was only conversational.
mismatch_repair.repair_action: APR feedback was folded into LoopAndLoop as riskContract, authority, typed verifiers, externalReviewPolicy, claim lifecycle/domain transfer guardrails, hidden eval, event envelope/artifact hash policy, and pilot-before-scale constraints; this record adds the Fairy Tale spiral receipt without adding runtime, broker, credential, or deploy authority.

validated_governance_template: Carry forward only the double-helix governance shape: pair a concrete delivery artifact with a concrete learning/governance artifact; preserve riskContract, authority, typed verifier, external review, hidden eval, artifact hash, and pilot-before-scale gates; re-synthesize strategy-specific delivery details per loop.
win_condition: The LoopAndLoop Turtle loop remains ready by its CLI/status tests, Fairy Tale spiral_revolution_check.py accepts this 0003 record, and no record claims live trading/deploy authority from NLM or APR alone.
budget_radius: Bounded: one Fairy Tale spiral ledger record referencing an already-pushed LoopAndLoop docs/YAML/eval change; no runtime code, no broker connection, no credential handling, no deployment, no agent fan-out.
safety_floor: Unchanged: security, credential, broker, deploy, main-release, copyright, external publication, and human approval gates outrank spiral altitude; NLM/PDF/APR evidence is advisory until explicit authority gates are satisfied.
